hero.subhead: Clarity in your numbers to make better decisions — for individuals, freelancers, and businesses.
hero.body: Sarria Wealth is an independent financial analysis practice dedicated to bringing structure, visibility, and rigour to dispersed financial information.

video.title: What I do and how I work
video.caption: Video (60–90s) — Agustín's introduction
video.transcript: "At Sarria Wealth I work with individuals and businesses who have the data, but lack the clarity. My work is to structure that information, identify what truly matters, and turn it into actionable analysis."

items.title: Confusing cash with profitability
items.body: Revenue flowing in and out, yet little clarity on true margins or where the money actually goes.

items.title: Poorly structured income statement
items.body: Accounting prepared for the tax authority, not for management: margins, costs, and break-even left unclear.

items.title: Disorganised debt and financing
items.body: Loans, credit lines, or leasing without a clear view of net debt, financing costs, and repayment capacity.

steps.title: Introductory call
steps.body: 15 minutes. I understand your situation and explain what I could do.

steps.title: Information gathering
steps.body: I collect the required data and organise it with analytical rigour.

steps.title: Model + reporting
steps.body: I build the analysis: balance sheet, management P&L, cash flow, key ratios.

steps.title: Analysis session
steps.body: I present findings and we define concrete next steps together.

tabs.label: Dashboard
tabs.caption: Executive view of key financial metrics.

tabs.label: Management P&L
tabs.caption: Income statement structured for decisions, not for tax purposes.

tabs.label: Cash flow
tabs.caption: Operating, investing, and financing cash flows.

tools.title: Financial models
tools.body: A focused set of templates to structure and analyse financial information with clarity.

about.title: About Sarria Wealth
about.body: Founded by Agustín Quiroga. Background in international banking, financial analysis, and reporting. Currently working in the finance department at GVC Gaesco, supporting reporting, planning, and reporting automation projects.

finalCta.title: Understand your numbers — really
finalCta.body: Book an introductory call and let's see whether I can help you organise, analyse, and decide with greater clarity.

hero.body: Two services designed to bring structure and visibility to complex or dispersed financial situations.

a.title: Financial Diagnostic
a.description: A structured review of the current financial situation. Ideal for those who sense something is off, but lack the clarity to identify where the problem lies.
items: Balance sheet and net worth structure review
Debt, financing, and financial cost review
Identification of critical points and findings
a.durationValue: 5–10 business days from receipt of information

b.title: Financial Reconstruction
b.description: Full reconstruction of the management income statement. For businesses working with tax-driven accounting that need real visibility on margins, costs, and profitability.
items: Fixed and variable cost separation and classification
Real profitability by line or segment (if applicable)
b.durationValue: 10–20 business days from receipt of information

items.q: Do you work with individuals and businesses?
items.a: Yes. I work with freelancers, small and medium-sized businesses, and individuals with complex personal financial situations.
No. Sarria Wealth does not offer investment advice, does not hold funds, and does not sell financial products. The work is analysis, structure, and reporting.

items.q: What do I need to get started?
items.a: Three things: financial statements from the last 1–2 years (balance sheet and income statement), recent bank statements, and 15 minutes for an introductory conversation.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: It depends on complexity and the availability of information. A typical diagnostic takes 5–10 business days. A full reconstruction may require 2–4 weeks.

cta.title: Want to find out if I can help?

hero.body: A focused set of templates to structure and analyse financial information with clarity. Free to download for personal and professional use.

herramientas.disclaimer: These templates are for educational purposes. They do not constitute financial, tax, or investment advice.

items.title: Balance Sheet Template
items.description: Clear structure of assets, liabilities, and equity. Ready to input data and automatically compute liquidity and solvency ratios.

items.title: Management Income Statement
items.description: P&L structured for management, with fixed/variable cost separation, contribution margin, and break-even.

items.title: Cash Flow Model
items.description: Operating, investing, and financing cash flows. Quarterly and annual projections with cash position visualisation.

modal.title: Free download
modal.body: Enter your name and email to receive the template.
modal.success: Done! Click the link below to download.

bio.title: Background
bio.p1: Finance background with experience in international banking and financial analysis. I have worked in analytically demanding environments where precision and clarity of information are non-negotiable.
bio.p2: I currently work in the finance department at GVC Gaesco, supporting reporting, financial planning, and reporting automation projects. This context directly informs Sarria Wealth's approach: analytical rigour applied to real situations.
bio.p3: Sarria Wealth was founded on the conviction that many individuals and businesses already hold the information needed to make better decisions — they simply lack the structure and judgement to interpret it.

items.title: Rigour and structure
items.body: Financial analysis without methodology produces noise. Every project follows a clear framework with information hierarchy and analytical judgement.

items.title: Discretion
items.body: Financial information is sensitive. All work is conducted in strict confidence. Client data is never shared under any circumstances.

items.title: Independence
items.body: No conflicts of interest. No products to sell. The analysis serves only the client.

cta.title: Does it make sense to work together?

hero.body: A 15-minute introductory conversation. I explain how I work and we see whether it makes sense to move forward. No commitment.

whatToExpect.title: What happens on the call
items: I explain what I could do and how
If it makes sense, we agree on next steps
